activation_checks: economy draft PR or exact branch head exists
different model or qualified human adversarial review completed
confirmed defects repaired or explicitly unresolved
live GitHub head and changed-file scope verified
fresh execution branch created from then-current accepted Lab main

canonical_layers.lab: canonical accepted institutional working state, not automatic truth
canonical_layers.sandbox: canonical shared history and context, not automatic truth safety correctness legality deployment or Lab acceptance
canonical_layers.mithub: canonical participant intellectual lineage, not authority over Sandbox Lab or external truth

phase_a_blockers: exact SHA operational clearance receipt and authorization
hard_red_lines: no unauthorized targeting of real systems or people
no automatic Lab writes or promotion
no external financial value redemption or live financial mechanisms
no licence laundering or unattributed third-party material
no real-user deployment without a separate gate
required_reviews: mechanical schema validator and test review
different-family incentive social and user-harm attack
non_claims: this queue does not implement or clear Sandbox
this queue does not authorize money tokens markets real users or external targeting
this queue does not make Mithub or University operational
this queue does not resolve the closed-world economy operation
this queue does not authorize merge
model diversity is not automatic independence
Git history does not establish truth
